---
name: Bug report
about: Report incorrect behavior in base-agent-company
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the current behavior clearly.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen instead.

## Steps To Reproduce

1. List the exact steps that reproduce the problem.
2. Include example commands or paths when relevant.
3. Note whether the issue is deterministic or intermittent.

## Affected Files Or Areas

List the folders, prompts, policies, scripts, or docs involved.

## Additional Context

Include environment details, logs, screenshots, or follow-up context that would help someone reproduce the problem.
